name: @webeverything/validation-generation
description: Web Everything validation-generation standard contract (#085/#309). Curated subpath exports list ONLY the WE-resident contract: provider, registry, fieldError, cel, and service (Mode-2 wire types only). crossField, adapters/*, and the service handler are excluded by omission so Node exports semantics enforce the #730 standard/impl split mechanically (#804 3a). Resolved by sibling consumers via tsconfig paths + vite alias (#804 2a); publish is a later, separately-prioritized build (#804 2b).
